name: OctantInsight
description: Autonomous agent that collects, analyzes, and designs evaluation mechanisms for Octant-funded public goods projects — surfacing patterns and insights that humans cannot extract at scale.

model.purpose: Private semantic analysis of qualitative project data that quantitative metrics cannot capture

dataSources.name: GitHub API
dataSources.data: commit frequency, contributor count, stars, forks, weekly activity trends
dataSources.auth: optional token for higher rate limits

dataSources.name: Octant Allocation Records
dataSources.data: ETH received per epoch, participation history across epochs 1-5

dataCollectionOutputs: normalized per-project GitHub metrics (stars, forks, commits/90d, contributor count, weekly avg)
structured portfolio dataset ready for downstream analysis

evaluationMechanism.description: A reusable, transparent scoring framework designed for consistent project evaluation across Octant epochs

dimensions.name: FundingAlignment
dimensions.measures: Whether current funding matches impact delivered
signals: impact score vs ETH received ratio

evaluationMechanism.leadingIndicator: commit frequency at 90 days post-funding is the strongest predictor of long-term project health

whyVeniceMatters: Funding allocation data is sensitive. Which projects are underperforming, which allocators vote together, which categories are being gamed — these are signals that shouldn't be exposed publicly during analysis. Venice's no-data-retention inference ensures the reasoning stays private while the structured output is fully shareable.
tracks: Agents for Public Goods Data Analysis for Project Evaluation — Octant
Agents for Public Goods Data Collection for Project Evaluation — Octant
Mechanism Design for Public Goods Evaluation — Octant
